name: Dak's Apple Wheat Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Plus 1 tablespoon apple juice, warmed
1 Golden Delicious apple, grated with skin (measures about 1 1/4 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all the ingredients into the bread machine in the order listed.
2. Select 'whole wheat' setting and push 'start'.
